name: Harkon's Bite
description:
A dire wolf tooth dangles from this simple cord necklace. While you wear it, the necklace grants you a +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Curse", "entries": ["Attuning to Harkon's Bite curses you until either Harkon Lukas removes the necklace from you or you are targeted by a {@spell remove curse} spell or similar magic.
